tasks.content: Identify what systems, data, and resources the insider has accessed and potentially compromised. This must be done carefully to avoid alerting the insider if they are still active.
outcomes: All accessed systems and data are identified
Timeline of insider activity is established

subtasks.title: Identify accessed systems
subtasks.content: Identified all systems, applications, and resources the insider has accessed using their legitimate credentials.

subtasks.title: Review data access logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed detailed logs of file access, downloads, email attachments, cloud storage usage, and removable media usage.

subtasks.title: Check for data exfiltration
subtasks.content: Checked for signs of data exfiltration including: large file transfers, uploads to personal cloud storage, emails to personal accounts, use of USB drives or external storage.

subtasks.title: Establish timeline
subtasks.content: Established a timeline of the insider's activities to understand when the behavior started and what actions were taken.

subtasks.title: Identify sensitive data exposure
subtasks.content: Identified what sensitive or confidential data the insider may have accessed or exfiltrated.

tasks.title: Assess Need for External Support
tasks.content: Determine if external legal counsel, forensics experts, or law enforcement should be involved based on the severity and nature of the insider threat.
outcomes: Decision is made whether to involve law enforcement
Decision is made whether to hire external legal counsel
Decision is made whether to hire forensics investigators

subtasks.title: Consult with legal counsel
subtasks.content: Consulted with legal counsel to determine if the incident constitutes a crime (theft, fraud, sabotage) requiring law enforcement involvement.

subtasks.title: Consider forensics investigator
subtasks.content: Considered retaining a digital forensics investigator to ensure evidence is properly collected and preserved for potential legal proceedings.

subtasks.title: Consider employment law specialist
subtasks.content: Considered retaining an employment law specialist to ensure compliance with employment laws and regulations during the investigation.

subtasks.title: Consider ORNA support
subtasks.content: Considered retaining ORNA for incident response expertise.

tasks.title: Assess Impact
tasks.content: Assess the operational, financial, legal, and reputational impact of the insider threat incident.

subtasks.title: Assess data compromise
subtasks.content: Assessed what sensitive data was compromised including: intellectual property, trade secrets, customer data, employee information, financial data.

subtasks.title: Assess business disruption
subtasks.content: Assessed whether any systems were sabotaged or disrupted affecting business operations.

subtasks.title: Assess regulatory impact
subtasks.content: Assessed regulatory impact and whether any data breach notification laws are triggered (PII, PHI, financial data).

subtasks.title: Assess competitive harm
subtasks.content: Assessed potential competitive harm if the insider is moving to a competitor or sharing information with competitors.

tasks.title: Determine Insider Motivation and Method
tasks.content: Understand why the insider took these actions and how they bypassed or exploited security controls.
outcomes: Methods used to compromise security are identified

subtasks.title: Investigate motivation
subtasks.content: Investigated potential motivations: financial gain, revenge/disgruntlement, ideology, coercion/blackmail, or simply negligence/carelessness.

subtasks.title: Identify bypassed controls
subtasks.content: Identified what security controls were bypassed or exploited using legitimate access credentials.

subtasks.title: Review HR records
subtasks.content: Reviewed HR records for context: recent disciplinary actions, resignation notice, performance issues, or upcoming termination.

subtasks.title: Check for accomplices
subtasks.content: Checked whether the insider had accomplices inside or outside the organization.

tasks.title: Coordinate with HR and Legal on Employee Actions
tasks.content: Work closely with HR and Legal to determine appropriate personnel actions while the investigation continues.

subtasks.title: Review employment agreements
subtasks.content: Reviewed employment agreements, confidentiality agreements, and acceptable use policies that the insider signed.

subtasks.title: Determine employee status
subtasks.content: Determined whether the employee should be: suspended, placed on administrative leave, allowed to continue working with monitoring, or terminated.

subtasks.title: Plan for employee interview
subtasks.content: Planned for potential employee interview or confrontation with HR and Legal present.

subtasks.title: Consider legal action
subtasks.content: Considered whether civil or criminal legal action should be pursued.

phases.name: Containment
phases.description: The main objective of the Containment stage is to stop the insider's unauthorized activities and prevent further damage.

tasks.title: Disable or Restrict Insider's Access
tasks.content: Carefully disable or restrict the insider's access to systems and data to prevent further harm. This must be done carefully to avoid alerting them if continued monitoring is needed.

subtasks.title: Disable user accounts
subtasks.content: Disabled the insider's user accounts across all systems: Active Directory, email, VPN, cloud services, and applications.

subtasks.title: Revoke credentials and tokens
subtasks.content: Revoked all credentials, API keys, security tokens, and certificates associated with the insider.

subtasks.title: Disable physical access
subtasks.content: Disabled physical access badges and changed any access codes or locks the insider may have known.

subtasks.title: Block remote access
subtasks.content: Blocked all remote access methods including VPN, remote desktop, and cloud service access.

subtasks.title: Preserve evidence
subtasks.content: Ensured that account disabling preserved audit logs and evidence needed for investigation.

tasks.title: Secure and Preserve Evidence
tasks.content: Immediately secure all digital and physical evidence related to the insider's activities while maintaining proper chain of custody.
outcomes: Evidence is admissible for legal proceedings

subtasks.title: Image insider's devices
subtasks.content: Created forensic images of the insider's computer, laptop, and mobile devices before they can be altered.

subtasks.title: Preserve email and communications
subtasks.content: Preserved the insider's email account, chat messages, and other communications before they can be deleted.

subtasks.title: Preserve log files
subtasks.content: Preserved all relevant log files including authentication logs, file access logs, network logs, and application logs.

subtasks.title: Document chain of custody
subtasks.content: Documented chain of custody for all evidence collected to ensure admissibility in legal proceedings.

subtasks.title: Secure physical evidence
subtasks.content: Secured any physical evidence including documents, USB drives, hard drives, or other media.

tasks.title: Monitor for Continued Activity
tasks.content: Implement monitoring to detect if the insider attempts to access systems through other means or if accomplices are continuing malicious activity.
outcomes: Monitoring is in place for continued threats

subtasks.title: Monitor for access attempts
subtasks.content: Monitored for attempts by the insider to access systems using alternative credentials or methods.

subtasks.title: Monitor associate accounts
subtasks.content: Monitored accounts of close associates who might be accomplices or whose credentials might be used.

subtasks.title: Monitor external communications
subtasks.content: Monitored for attempts to communicate with external parties to share stolen data or coordinate further activity.

tasks.title: Execute Personnel Actions
tasks.content: Coordinate with HR to execute appropriate personnel actions based on legal guidance and investigation findings.

subtasks.title: Coordinate with Legal
subtasks.content: Coordinated with Legal Counsel on the appropriate personnel action and process.

subtasks.title: Conduct employee meeting
subtasks.content: Conducted meeting with the employee (with HR and Legal present) to address the incident and explain actions being taken.

subtasks.title: Execute suspension or termination
subtasks.content: Executed suspension, administrative leave, or termination according to company policy and legal requirements.

subtasks.title: Collect company property
subtasks.content: Collected all company property including laptops, phones, badges, keys, and documents.

subtasks.title: Document all actions
subtasks.content: Documented all personnel actions taken for the employee's file and potential legal proceedings.

tasks.title: Invoke Business Continuity Plan
tasks.content: If the insider held a critical role, activate business continuity procedures to maintain operations.

subtasks.title: Identify critical responsibilities
subtasks.content: Identified the insider's critical responsibilities and knowledge.

subtasks.title: Reassign responsibilities
subtasks.content: Reassigned critical responsibilities to other team members.

subtasks.title: Transfer knowledge and access
subtasks.content: Transferred necessary knowledge and legitimate system access to team members covering the insider's role.

tasks.title: Control Internal Communications
tasks.content: Carefully manage internal communications about the incident to protect the investigation and employee privacy.

subtasks.title: Prepare internal statement
subtasks.content: Prepared a limited internal statement (if needed) that protects the investigation and employee privacy.

subtasks.title: Brief management
subtasks.content: Briefed relevant management on need-to-know basis about the situation and expected actions.

subtasks.title: Control information flow
subtasks.content: Controlled information flow to prevent gossip or speculation that could harm the investigation or employee.

phases.name: Eradication
phases.description: The Eradication stage focuses on removing any backdoors or persistent threats and addressing security gaps that enabled the insider threat.

tasks.title: Remove Insider's Unauthorized Access Methods
tasks.content: Identify and remove any backdoors, unauthorized accounts, or persistence mechanisms the insider may have created.
outcomes: All backdoors are identified and removed

subtasks.title: Scan for rogue accounts
subtasks.content: Scanned all systems for unauthorized accounts or accounts with elevated privileges that the insider may have created.

subtasks.title: Check for backdoors
subtasks.content: Checked for backdoors including: modified system files, unauthorized remote access tools, or hidden services.

subtasks.title: Review API keys and tokens
subtasks.content: Reviewed all API keys, service accounts, and authentication tokens the insider had access to and rotated them.

subtasks.title: Remove unauthorized software
subtasks.content: Removed any unauthorized software or tools the insider may have installed.

tasks.title: Reset Credentials and Secrets
tasks.content: Reset all credentials, passwords, and secrets that the insider had knowledge of or access to.
outcomes: All potentially compromised credentials are reset

subtasks.title: Reset shared credentials
subtasks.content: Reset all shared passwords, service account credentials, and admin passwords the insider had access to.

subtasks.title: Rotate encryption keys
subtasks.content: Rotated encryption keys and certificates that the insider may have had access to.

subtasks.title: Reset database credentials
subtasks.content: Reset database connection strings and credentials that the insider had access to.

subtasks.title: Update access codes
subtasks.content: Updated physical access codes, alarm codes, and safe combinations the insider knew.

tasks.title: Address Security Control Gaps
tasks.content: Implement security improvements to address the control gaps that allowed the insider threat to succeed.

subtasks.title: Implement DLP controls
subtasks.content: Implemented or enhanced Data Loss Prevention (DLP) controls to detect and prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.

subtasks.title: Enhance user activity monitoring
subtasks.content: Enhanced user activity monitoring and behavioral analytics to detect anomalous insider behavior.

subtasks.title: Implement privileged access management
subtasks.content: Implemented Privileged Access Management (PAM) solutions to control and monitor privileged account usage.

subtasks.title: Restrict removable media
subtasks.content: Implemented stricter controls on removable media and external storage devices.

subtasks.title: Improve access controls
subtasks.content: Improved access controls based on principle of least privilege and need-to-know.

tasks.title: Review and Update Policies
tasks.content: Review and update security policies, acceptable use policies, and data handling policies based on lessons learned.

subtasks.title: Update acceptable use policy
subtasks.content: Updated acceptable use policy to clarify expectations and prohibited activities.

subtasks.title: Update data handling policy
subtasks.content: Updated data classification and handling policies to better protect sensitive information.

subtasks.title: Update monitoring policy
subtasks.content: Updated employee monitoring policy to clearly communicate what is monitored and why.

subtasks.title: Update offboarding procedures
subtasks.content: Updated employee offboarding procedures to ensure proper access revocation and knowledge transfer.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.description: The Recovery stage aims to restore normal operations and rebuild trust while addressing any ongoing legal or HR matters.

tasks.title: Restore Affected Systems and Data
tasks.content: Restore any systems or data that were damaged or deleted by the insider.

subtasks.title: Restore from backups
subtasks.content: Restored any deleted or corrupted data from clean backups.

subtasks.title: Rebuild compromised systems
subtasks.content: Rebuilt any systems that were sabotaged or compromised by the insider.

subtasks.title: Verify data integrity
subtasks.content: Verified integrity of critical data to ensure nothing was tampered with or corrupted.

subtasks.title: Test functionality
subtasks.content: Tested all restored systems and data to ensure proper functionality.

tasks.title: Mitigate Data Exposure
tasks.content: Take steps to mitigate the impact of any data that was exfiltrated by the insider.
outcomes: Affected parties are notified if required

subtasks.title: Assess data breach notification requirements
subtasks.content: Assessed whether data breach notification laws require notification to regulators or affected individuals.

subtasks.title: Invoke legal protections
subtasks.content: Worked with Legal to invoke cease-and-desist orders, non-compete agreements, or trade secret protections.

subtasks.title: Notify affected parties
subtasks.content: Notified customers, partners, or other affected parties if their data was compromised.

subtasks.title: Monitor for data disclosure
subtasks.content: Monitored dark web, public repositories, and competitor activity for signs of stolen data being disclosed or used.

tasks.title: Address Team and Cultural Impact
tasks.content: Address the impact on team morale and organizational culture from the insider threat incident.

subtasks.title: Support affected team members
subtasks.content: Provided support to team members who worked closely with the insider and may be affected by the incident.

subtasks.title: Rebuild trust
subtasks.content: Worked to rebuild trust within the organization while maintaining necessary security controls.

subtasks.title: Reinforce security culture
subtasks.content: Reinforced a positive security culture that balances trust with appropriate monitoring and controls.

subtasks.title: Address concerns
subtasks.content: Addressed employee concerns about privacy and monitoring in an open and transparent manner.

tasks.title: Complete Legal and HR Proceedings
tasks.content: Complete any ongoing legal proceedings, employment actions, or investigations related to the insider.
outcomes: Legal proceedings are completed or ongoing

subtasks.title: Complete termination process
subtasks.content: Completed employee termination process according to company policy and legal requirements.

subtasks.title: Pursue legal action
subtasks.content: Pursued appropriate civil or criminal legal action if warranted and approved by leadership.

subtasks.title: Cooperate with law enforcement
subtasks.content: Cooperated with law enforcement investigation if criminal charges are being pursued.

subtasks.title: Document outcomes
subtasks.content: Documented all legal and HR outcomes for organizational records.

tasks.title: Resolve Incident
tasks.content: Once all technical remediation and immediate personnel matters are addressed, resolve the incident.
outcomes: The incident is declared as resolved

subtasks.title: Verify technical remediation
subtasks.content: Verified that all technical remediation is complete and systems are secure.

subtasks.title: Change incident status
subtasks.content: Changed status of incident to 'resolved' (noting that legal proceedings may continue).

phases.name: Lessons Learned
phases.description: The Lessons Learned stage's main goal is to compile all relevant information about the incident and implement improvements to prevent future insider threats.

tasks.title: Generate Incident Report
tasks.content: Create a comprehensive but carefully controlled incident report given the sensitive personnel nature of the incident.

subtasks.title: Generate report
subtasks.content: Generated the incident report using the Reports tab.

subtasks.title: Review with Legal and HR
subtasks.content: Reviewed the report with Legal and HR to ensure employee privacy protection and legal compliance.

subtasks.title: Redact sensitive information
subtasks.content: Redacted employee names and other personally identifiable information from reports shared beyond need-to-know individuals.

subtasks.title: Document technical findings
subtasks.content: Documented technical findings about control gaps and detection methods for security improvement.

subtasks.title: Secure report storage
subtasks.content: Ensured the incident report is stored securely with appropriate access controls given its sensitive nature.

tasks.title: Conduct Confidential Lessons Learned Session
tasks.content: Conduct a lessons learned session with appropriate participants while protecting employee privacy and investigation details.

subtasks.title: Prepare presentation
subtasks.content: Prepared presentation focusing on technical and procedural lessons while protecting employee privacy.

subtasks.title: Host confidential session
subtasks.content: Hosted the lessons learned session with appropriate stakeholders under strict confidentiality.

subtasks.title: Discuss detection methods
subtasks.content: Discussed what detection methods worked and what indicators were missed or delayed.

subtasks.title: Identify control gaps
subtasks.content: Identified security control gaps that enabled the insider threat.

subtasks.title: Create improvement plan
subtasks.content: Created an action plan for implementing technical and policy improvements.

tasks.title: Implement Insider Threat Program Improvements
tasks.content: Implement or enhance an insider threat program based on lessons learned from this incident.
outcomes: Insider threat program is implemented or improved

subtasks.title: Establish insider threat program
subtasks.content: Established or enhanced a formal insider threat program with defined roles, responsibilities, and processes.

subtasks.title: Implement behavioral analytics
subtasks.content: Implemented User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) to detect anomalous insider behavior.

subtasks.title: Enhance DLP capabilities
subtasks.content: Enhanced Data Loss Prevention (DLP) capabilities to detect and prevent data exfiltration.

subtasks.title: Improve hiring and screening
subtasks.content: Worked with HR to improve pre-employment screening and background check processes.

subtasks.title: Create insider threat awareness
subtasks.content: Created insider threat awareness training for managers to recognize warning signs.

tasks.title: Conduct Security Awareness Training
tasks.content: Conduct security awareness training for employees on insider threats, focusing on reporting procedures and security best practices.

subtasks.title: Develop training materials
subtasks.content: Developed training materials on insider threats, warning signs, and reporting procedures (without revealing details of this incident).

subtasks.title: Conduct awareness training
subtasks.content: Conducted security awareness training for all employees emphasizing the importance of reporting concerns.

subtasks.title: Train managers
subtasks.content: Provided specialized training for managers on recognizing warning signs and proper escalation procedures.

subtasks.title: Establish anonymous reporting
subtasks.content: Established or promoted anonymous reporting mechanisms for employees to report concerns.

name: Offboarding Employee
description: Comprehensive playbook for secure employee offboarding process to ensure proper access revocation, asset collection, and security controls when employees leave the organization.

phases.name: Preparation
phases.description: Initial preparation and documentation phase for employee offboarding.

tasks.title: Receive Offboarding Notification
tasks.content: Receive formal notification that an employee is leaving the organization and begin the offboarding process.

subtasks.title: Receive notification from HR
subtasks.content: Received formal notification from HR about employee departure including last working day and reason for departure.

subtasks.title: Notify IT and Security teams
subtasks.content: Notified IT and Security teams to begin offboarding preparations.

subtasks.title: Review employee role and access
subtasks.content: Reviewed employee's role, responsibilities, and access levels to plan appropriate offboarding steps.

tasks.title: Document Employee Access
tasks.content: Create a comprehensive inventory of all systems, applications, and resources the employee has access to.
outcomes: All systems and applications are documented

subtasks.title: Document system accounts
subtasks.content: Documented all system accounts including Active Directory, email, VPN, cloud services, and applications.

subtasks.title: Document privileged access
subtasks.content: Documented any privileged or administrative access the employee has.

subtasks.title: Document physical access
subtasks.content: Documented physical access including badges, keys, alarm codes, and building access.

subtasks.title: Document company assets
subtasks.content: Documented all company assets assigned to the employee including devices, equipment, and materials.

phases.name: Access Revocation
phases.description: Systematically revoke all access to systems, applications, and physical facilities.

tasks.title: Revoke System Access
tasks.content: Disable or remove the employee's access to all IT systems and applications on or after their last working day.

subtasks.title: Disable Active Directory account
subtasks.content: Disabled the employee's Active Directory account and all associated group memberships.

subtasks.title: Disable email account
subtasks.content: Disabled email account and set up forwarding if required by business needs.

subtasks.title: Revoke VPN and remote access
subtasks.content: Revoked VPN access, remote desktop access, and any other remote connectivity methods.

subtasks.title: Remove cloud service access
subtasks.content: Removed access to cloud services including SaaS applications, cloud storage, and collaboration tools.

subtasks.title: Revoke application access
subtasks.content: Revoked access to all business applications including CRM, ERP, databases, and specialized tools.

tasks.title: Revoke Physical Access
tasks.content: Revoke the employee's physical access to all company facilities and secured areas.
outcomes: Keys and access cards are collected

subtasks.title: Disable access badges
subtasks.content: Disabled all physical access badges and key cards in the access control system.

subtasks.title: Collect badges and keys
subtasks.content: Collected all physical badges, keys, and access cards from the departing employee.

subtasks.title: Update access codes
subtasks.content: Changed alarm codes, safe combinations, and any other access codes the employee knew.

subtasks.title: Update parking access
subtasks.content: Revoked parking permits and garage access if applicable.

tasks.title: Reset Shared Credentials
tasks.content: Reset all shared passwords, service accounts, and credentials that the departing employee had knowledge of.

subtasks.title: Reset shared passwords
subtasks.content: Reset all shared passwords and credentials that the employee had access to.

subtasks.title: Rotate service account credentials
subtasks.content: Rotated service account credentials and API keys the employee may have known.

subtasks.title: Update team accounts
subtasks.content: Updated credentials for any team or department accounts the employee had access to.

subtasks.title: Reset admin credentials
subtasks.content: Reset any administrative or privileged credentials the employee had access to.

phases.name: Asset Collection
phases.description: Collect all company property and assets from the departing employee.

tasks.title: Collect Company Assets
tasks.content: Collect all company-owned devices, equipment, documents, and other property from the departing employee.

subtasks.title: Collect computers and devices
subtasks.content: Collected all company-owned computers, laptops, tablets, and mobile devices.

subtasks.title: Collect peripherals and accessories
subtasks.content: Collected monitors, keyboards, mice, headsets, chargers, and other peripherals.

subtasks.title: Collect company documents
subtasks.content: Collected any physical company documents, files, and proprietary materials.

subtasks.title: Collect company credit cards
subtasks.content: Collected company credit cards, expense cards, and corporate accounts.

subtasks.title: Verify asset return
subtasks.content: Verified all assets against the documented inventory and obtained sign-off.

tasks.title: Backup and Transfer Data
tasks.content: Back up the employee's work data and transfer ownership of critical files and projects to appropriate team members.
outcomes: Employee's work data is backed up

subtasks.title: Backup employee files
subtasks.content: Created a backup of the employee's work files, emails, and documents for business continuity.

subtasks.title: Transfer file ownership
subtasks.content: Transferred ownership of shared files, folders, and documents to appropriate team members.

subtasks.title: Transfer project ownership
subtasks.content: Transferred ownership and responsibility for ongoing projects to designated individuals.

subtasks.title: Document knowledge transfer
subtasks.content: Documented critical knowledge, processes, and information the employee possessed.

phases.name: Review and Monitoring
phases.description: Review the employee's access history and monitor for any post-departure security concerns.

tasks.title: Review Data Access Logs
tasks.content: Review the employee's access logs and activity history to identify any suspicious or concerning behavior prior to departure.

subtasks.title: Review authentication logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed authentication logs for unusual access patterns or timing.

subtasks.title: Review file access logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed file access and download logs for mass data access or exfiltration attempts.

subtasks.title: Review email activity
subtasks.content: Reviewed email activity for forwarding to personal accounts or unusual external communications.

subtasks.title: Check for data exfiltration
subtasks.content: Checked for signs of data exfiltration via USB drives, cloud storage, or email.

tasks.title: Conduct Exit Interview
tasks.content: Conduct an exit interview with the departing employee to reinforce confidentiality obligations and collect final information.

subtasks.title: Conduct exit interview
subtasks.content: Conducted exit interview with HR present to discuss the transition and gather feedback.

subtasks.title: Review confidentiality agreements
subtasks.content: Reviewed confidentiality agreements, non-disclosure agreements (NDA), and non-compete clauses.

subtasks.title: Remind of obligations
subtasks.content: Reminded the employee of their ongoing obligations regarding confidential information and company property.

subtasks.title: Document exit interview
subtasks.content: Documented the exit interview and any relevant information for HR records.

tasks.title: Monitor for Post-Departure Activity
tasks.content: Monitor for any attempted access or suspicious activity from the departed employee after their last working day.

subtasks.title: Monitor access attempts
subtasks.content: Monitored logs for any attempts by the departed employee to access systems using old credentials.

subtasks.title: Set up alerts
subtasks.content: Set up alerts for any activity associated with the departed employee's accounts or identifiers.

subtasks.title: Monitor for data disclosure
subtasks.content: Monitored for any disclosure or misuse of company information by the departed employee.

phases.name: Completion
phases.description: Finalize the offboarding process and ensure all steps have been completed.

tasks.title: Document Offboarding Completion
tasks.content: Document that all offboarding steps have been completed and obtain sign-offs from appropriate stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Complete offboarding checklist
subtasks.content: Completed the full offboarding checklist verifying all steps have been performed.

subtasks.title: Obtain stakeholder sign-offs
subtasks.content: Obtained sign-offs from IT, Security, HR, and the employee's manager confirming completion.

subtasks.title: Update employee records
subtasks.content: Updated employee records in HRIS system to reflect departure and offboarding completion.

subtasks.title: Archive offboarding documentation
subtasks.content: Archived all offboarding documentation for future reference and audit purposes.

name: Business Email Compromise Response
description: Comprehensive playbook for responding to Business Email Compromise (BEC) attacks including CEO fraud, wire transfer fraud, vendor impersonation, and account takeover targeting financial transactions and sensitive business operations.

phases.name: Identification
phases.description: The purpose of the Identification stage is to accurately determine the BEC attack type, scope, and perform immediate containment to prevent financial loss.

tasks.title: Initiate CIRT Team Meeting and Execute Escalation Procedures
tasks.content: Business Email Compromise incidents require immediate escalation due to potential for significant financial loss. Engage finance, legal, and executive leadership immediately.
outcomes: First Core CIRT meeting is held with Finance and Legal
Privileged Communications is established with legal counsel

subtasks.title: Initiate emergency CIRT meeting
subtasks.content: Initiated emergency meeting of the organizational core CIRT with Finance and Legal present.

subtasks.title: Notify executive leadership
subtasks.content: Immediately notified CFO, CEO, and relevant executives about potential BEC incident.

subtasks.title: Notify CIRT team members
subtasks.content: Notified CIRT team members using emergency contact procedures.

subtasks.title: Verify Incident Severity
subtasks.content: Verified the Incident Severity - BEC incidents are typically high or critical due to financial impact.

subtasks.title: Involve Finance team
subtasks.content: Immediately involved Finance team to review pending/recent wire transfers and payment requests.

subtasks.title: Work with Legal Counsel
subtasks.content: Worked closely with Legal Counsel regarding potential fraud, law enforcement notification, and regulatory requirements.

tasks.title: Validate Business Email Compromise Incident
tasks.content: Confirm the incident is a BEC attack and identify the specific type: CEO fraud, vendor impersonation, account compromise, attorney impersonation, or W-2 phishing.

subtasks.title: Analyze suspicious email
subtasks.content: Analyzed the suspicious email including headers, sender address, reply-to address, and content for signs of spoofing or compromise.

subtasks.title: Identify BEC type
subtasks.content: Identified BEC type: CEO Fraud (executive impersonation), Vendor Email Compromise, Account Compromise, Attorney Impersonation, or HR/W-2 Phishing.

subtasks.title: Check for account compromise
subtasks.content: Checked if legitimate email account was compromised vs. external spoofing by reviewing login logs and sent items.

subtasks.title: Verify with claimed sender
subtasks.content: Verified with the claimed sender (executive, vendor, etc.) through out-of-band communication that they did NOT send the email.

subtasks.title: Review payment requests
subtasks.content: Reviewed any payment or wire transfer requests for legitimacy and whether they were processed.

tasks.title: Determine Financial Impact and Stop Payments
tasks.content: Immediately assess financial impact and take urgent action to stop any fraudulent payments or wire transfers.
outcomes: All fraudulent payment requests are identified
Completed payments are identified for recovery

subtasks.title: Review recent payment requests
subtasks.content: Reviewed all payment requests from the past 30 days that match the BEC pattern (wire transfers, ACH, check requests).

subtasks.title: Stop pending payments
subtasks.content: Immediately stopped any pending payments or wire transfers related to the BEC attack.

subtasks.title: Contact financial institutions
subtasks.content: Contacted banks and financial institutions to stop/recall any recently completed fraudulent transfers.

subtasks.title: Document financial impact
subtasks.content: Documented total financial impact including attempted and completed fraudulent transfers.

subtasks.title: Freeze additional transfers
subtasks.content: Implemented temporary freeze or enhanced verification for all outgoing wire transfers and large payments.

tasks.title: Determine Scope of Compromise
tasks.content: Identify all affected email accounts, systems, and understand how the attacker gained access or impersonated legitimate parties.
outcomes: All compromised email accounts are identified

subtasks.title: Review email logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed email server logs and mail flow logs to identify suspicious emails and recipients.

subtasks.title: Check for account compromise
subtasks.content: Checked authentication logs for compromised executive or vendor email accounts showing unauthorized access.

subtasks.title: Identify all recipients
subtasks.content: Identified all employees who received similar BEC emails to determine full scope.

subtasks.title: Search for similar emails
subtasks.content: Searched mailboxes for similar fraudulent emails using patterns, sender domains, and subject lines.

subtasks.title: Interview affected employees
subtasks.content: Interviewed employees who received or responded to BEC emails to understand actions taken.

tasks.title: Contact Law Enforcement and Report Fraud
tasks.content: BEC incidents should be reported to law enforcement immediately, particularly FBI IC3, to enable recovery efforts and investigation.
outcomes: Financial institution fraud departments are engaged

subtasks.title: File FBI IC3 complaint
subtasks.content: Filed complaint with FBI Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) at ic3.gov including all relevant details and transaction information.

subtasks.title: Contact local FBI field office
subtasks.content: Contacted local FBI field office directly for BEC incidents involving large dollar amounts.

subtasks.title: Notify financial institution fraud dept
subtasks.content: Notified bank's fraud department and requested Financial Fraud Kill Chain to potentially recover funds.

subtasks.title: Document case numbers
subtasks.content: Documented all case numbers, contact information, and law enforcement liaison details.

tasks.title: Assess Need for External Support
tasks.content: Determine if external forensics, legal, or fraud recovery experts are needed.
outcomes: Decision is made whether to hire fraud recovery firm
Decision is made whether to hire forensics experts
Decision is made whether to hire external legal counsel

subtasks.title: Consider fraud recovery service
subtasks.content: Considered retaining a fraud recovery service to assist with recovering transferred funds.

subtasks.title: Consider forensics investigation
subtasks.content: Considered retaining digital forensics experts to investigate email compromise or account takeover.

subtasks.title: Consider outside legal counsel
subtasks.content: Considered retaining outside legal counsel specializing in cybercrime and fraud.

tasks.title: Send Internal Communications
tasks.content: Alert employees about the BEC attack to prevent additional victims and reinforce verification procedures.
outcomes: Employees know how to report suspicious requests

subtasks.title: Send immediate security alert
subtasks.content: Sent immediate security alert to all employees warning about active BEC attack targeting the organization.

subtasks.title: Reinforce verification procedures
subtasks.content: Reinforced payment verification procedures requiring out-of-band confirmation for all wire transfers and payment changes.

subtasks.title: Provide reporting instructions
subtasks.content: Provided clear instructions on how to report suspicious payment requests or executive emails.

subtasks.title: Alert Finance and AP teams
subtasks.content: Sent specific alert to Finance, Accounts Payable, and Procurement teams with enhanced vigilance instructions.

phases.name: Containment
phases.description: The main objective of the Containment stage is to stop the BEC attack, prevent additional financial loss, and secure compromised accounts.

tasks.title: Secure Compromised Email Accounts
tasks.content: If email accounts were compromised, immediately secure them and revoke access.

subtasks.title: Reset account passwords
subtasks.content: Reset passwords for all compromised email accounts immediately.

subtasks.title: Revoke active sessions
subtasks.content: Revoked all active sessions and forced re-authentication for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Enable MFA
subtasks.content: Enabled or re-registered multi-factor authentication for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Review mailbox rules
subtasks.content: Reviewed and removed any suspicious mailbox forwarding rules, auto-forward settings, or filters created by attacker.

subtasks.title: Check delegated access
subtasks.content: Checked for and removed any unauthorized delegated mailbox access or application permissions.

tasks.title: Block Malicious Emails and Domains
tasks.content: Block the sender addresses and domains used in the BEC attack to prevent further emails from reaching employees.

subtasks.title: Block sender addresses
subtasks.content: Blocked all sender email addresses used in the BEC attack at the email gateway.

subtasks.title: Block spoofed domains
subtasks.content: Blocked lookalike or typosquatting domains used to impersonate legitimate domains.

subtasks.title: Create email filter rules
subtasks.content: Created email filter rules to quarantine similar BEC emails based on subject lines, content patterns, and sender characteristics.

subtasks.title: Remove BEC emails from mailboxes
subtasks.content: Removed/quarantined BEC emails from all user mailboxes to prevent further interaction.

tasks.title: Implement Enhanced Payment Verification
tasks.content: Immediately implement enhanced verification procedures for all payment requests and financial transactions.
outcomes: Temporary payment holds are in place

subtasks.title: Require dual authorization
subtasks.content: Implemented requirement for dual authorization on all wire transfers and payments over threshold amount.

subtasks.title: Mandate callback verification
subtasks.content: Mandated callback verification using known phone numbers (not from email) for all payment change requests and large transfers.

subtasks.title: Flag vendor account changes
subtasks.content: Flagged all vendor banking information changes for extra scrutiny and verification.

subtasks.title: Implement temporary holds
subtasks.content: Implemented temporary holds or delays on all wire transfers to allow for verification.

tasks.title: Coordinate with Financial Institutions
tasks.content: Work with banks and financial institutions to attempt recovery of transferred funds through the Financial Fraud Kill Chain.
outcomes: Banks are engaged for fund recovery
Financial Fraud Kill Chain is activated

subtasks.title: Contact originating bank
subtasks.content: Contacted organization's bank immediately to report fraud and request recall of wire transfers.

subtasks.title: Request Financial Fraud Kill Chain
subtasks.content: Requested activation of FBI's Financial Fraud Kill Chain process to freeze funds at receiving bank.

subtasks.title: Provide transaction details
subtasks.content: Provided complete transaction details including amounts, dates, receiving account information, and wire instructions.

subtasks.title: Contact receiving bank
subtasks.content: Worked with law enforcement to contact receiving bank to freeze fraudulent account.

subtasks.title: File insurance claim
subtasks.content: Filed claim with cyber insurance or crime insurance policy if applicable.

tasks.title: Issue Communications Updates
tasks.content: Provide updates to stakeholders on containment actions and prevention measures.

subtasks.title: Update executive leadership
subtasks.content: Updated executive leadership on containment actions, financial impact, and recovery efforts.

subtasks.title: Communicate new procedures
subtasks.content: Communicated new payment verification procedures to all relevant staff.

subtasks.title: Remind about reporting
subtasks.content: Reminded employees to report any suspicious payment requests or executive communications.

phases.name: Eradication
phases.description: The Eradication stage focuses on removing attacker access, addressing security gaps, and preventing future BEC attacks.

tasks.title: Remove Attacker Persistence Mechanisms
tasks.content: Ensure attackers have no remaining access through compromised credentials, forwarding rules, or other persistence.

subtasks.title: Remove forwarding rules
subtasks.content: Removed all suspicious email forwarding rules, transport rules, and mail flow modifications.

subtasks.title: Revoke OAuth tokens
subtasks.content: Revoked all OAuth tokens and application permissions for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Reset related credentials
subtasks.content: Reset passwords for any accounts that shared credentials with compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Check for backdoor accounts
subtasks.content: Checked for creation of backdoor accounts or guest accounts by the attacker.

tasks.title: Implement Email Authentication Controls
tasks.content: Deploy email authentication technologies to prevent spoofing and impersonation.

subtasks.title: Configure DMARC policy
subtasks.content: Configured DMARC policy to reject or quarantine emails failing authentication checks.

subtasks.title: Harden SPF records
subtasks.content: Hardened SPF records to explicitly authorize sending servers and reject others.

subtasks.title: Enable DKIM signing
subtasks.content: Enabled DKIM signing for all outbound emails from the organization.

subtasks.title: Deploy external email banners
subtasks.content: Deployed external email warning banners to alert recipients when emails come from outside the organization.

subtasks.title: Block lookalike domains
subtasks.content: Configured email gateway to block emails from lookalike or typosquatting domains.

tasks.title: Strengthen Financial Controls
tasks.content: Implement improved financial controls and verification procedures to prevent future BEC success.

subtasks.title: Formalize verification procedures
subtasks.content: Formalized and documented payment verification procedures including callback requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement dollar thresholds
subtasks.content: Implemented dollar thresholds requiring escalating levels of approval for payments and wire transfers.

subtasks.title: Create vendor verification process
subtasks.content: Created formal process for verifying vendor banking information changes through multiple channels.

subtasks.title: Establish payment delay policy
subtasks.content: Established policy for mandatory delay period between request and execution of large wire transfers.

tasks.title: Update Security Policies
tasks.content: Update security policies to address BEC threats and establish clear procedures.

subtasks.title: Create BEC response procedures
subtasks.content: Created formal BEC incident response procedures for future incidents.

subtasks.title: Update AUP
subtasks.content: Updated Acceptable Use Policy to include email security requirements and verification responsibilities.

subtasks.title: Document escalation procedures
subtasks.content: Documented clear escalation procedures for suspicious payment requests.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.description: The Recovery stage aims to restore normal operations, recover funds if possible, and strengthen defenses.

tasks.title: Restore Compromised Accounts
tasks.content: Fully restore any compromised email accounts to normal operation with enhanced security.

subtasks.title: Verify account security
subtasks.content: Verified that all security settings are properly configured including MFA, backup codes, and recovery options.

subtasks.title: Restore mailbox functionality
subtasks.content: Restored full mailbox functionality and verified legitimate rules and delegates are in place.

subtasks.title: Monitor for suspicious activity
subtasks.content: Implemented enhanced monitoring for compromised accounts to detect any residual attacker activity.

tasks.title: Pursue Fund Recovery
tasks.content: Continue efforts to recover transferred funds through legal and law enforcement channels.
outcomes: Legal action is initiated if appropriate

subtasks.title: Work with law enforcement
subtasks.content: Continued working with FBI and local law enforcement on fund recovery and investigation.

subtasks.title: Pursue civil legal action
subtasks.content: Evaluated and pursued civil legal action against receiving parties if identifiable.

subtasks.title: Process insurance claims
subtasks.content: Processed cyber insurance or crime insurance claims for financial losses.

subtasks.title: Document recovery efforts
subtasks.content: Documented all fund recovery efforts and outcomes for financial and legal records.

tasks.title: Resume Normal Payment Operations
tasks.content: Carefully resume normal payment operations with enhanced security measures in place.
outcomes: Payment operations resume with new controls
Staff are trained on new procedures

subtasks.title: Lift payment holds
subtasks.content: Lifted temporary payment holds and freezes with new verification procedures in place.

subtasks.title: Train finance staff
subtasks.content: Trained finance and AP staff on new payment verification procedures and BEC awareness.

subtasks.title: Communicate to vendors
subtasks.content: Communicated to vendors about new payment verification procedures and potential delays.

tasks.title: Issue Final Communications
tasks.content: Communicate incident resolution and lessons learned to stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Update executive leadership
subtasks.content: Provided final update to executive leadership on incident resolution, financial impact, and prevention measures.

subtasks.title: Communicate to organization
subtasks.content: Communicated to entire organization about incident resolution and reinforced BEC awareness.

tasks.title: Resolve Incident
tasks.content: Formally close the BEC incident once all recovery actions are complete.

subtasks.title: Verify all actions complete
subtasks.content: Verified that all technical remediation, fund recovery efforts, and policy updates are complete.

subtasks.title: Change incident status
subtasks.content: Changed status of incident to 'resolved'.

phases.name: Lessons Learned
phases.description: The Lessons Learned stage compiles incident information and implements improvements to prevent future BEC attacks.

tasks.title: Generate Incident Report
tasks.content: Create comprehensive incident report documenting the BEC attack, response, and financial impact.

subtasks.title: Generate report
subtasks.content: Generated the incident report using the Reports tab.

subtasks.title: Document financial impact
subtasks.content: Documented complete financial impact including attempted, successful, and recovered amounts.

subtasks.title: Document response effectiveness
subtasks.content: Documented effectiveness of response actions and fund recovery efforts.

subtasks.title: Share with leadership
subtasks.content: Shared report with executive leadership, finance, and board if required.

tasks.title: Conduct Lessons Learned Session
tasks.content: Hold session with all stakeholders to identify improvements to BEC prevention and response.

subtasks.title: Prepare presentation
subtasks.content: Prepared presentation covering attack timeline, financial impact, response actions, and recommendations.

subtasks.title: Host session
subtasks.content: Hosted lessons learned session with Security, Finance, Legal, and Executive teams.

subtasks.title: Identify control gaps
subtasks.content: Identified specific gaps in email security, financial controls, and employee awareness that enabled the attack.

subtasks.title: Create action plan
subtasks.content: Created prioritized action plan for implementing improvements.

tasks.title: Implement BEC Awareness Training
tasks.content: Deploy comprehensive BEC awareness training for all employees, with specialized training for finance staff.

subtasks.title: Deploy BEC awareness training
subtasks.content: Deployed organization-wide training on BEC attacks, red flags, and reporting procedures.

subtasks.title: Conduct finance team training
subtasks.content: Conducted specialized training for finance, accounting, and procurement teams on BEC threats and verification procedures.

subtasks.title: Conduct executive awareness
subtasks.content: Conducted executive awareness session on CEO fraud and impersonation tactics.

subtasks.title: Plan simulated BEC exercises
subtasks.content: Planned simulated BEC exercises to test employee awareness and verification procedures.

tasks.title: Review and Update Financial Controls
tasks.content: Continuously review and improve financial controls based on emerging BEC tactics.

subtasks.title: Test verification procedures
subtasks.content: Tested payment verification procedures to ensure they are followed consistently.

subtasks.title: Monitor for BEC trends
subtasks.content: Subscribed to threat intelligence on emerging BEC tactics and trends.

subtasks.title: Schedule periodic reviews
subtasks.content: Scheduled periodic reviews of financial controls and BEC defenses.

name: Credential Compromise Response
description: Comprehensive playbook for responding to credential compromise incidents including stolen passwords, account takeover, credential stuffing attacks, and leaked credentials from data breaches.

phases.name: Identification
phases.description: The purpose of the Identification stage is to detect credential compromise, determine scope, and perform immediate containment.

tasks.title: Initiate CIRT Team Meeting and Execute Escalation Procedures
tasks.content: Credential compromise can lead to broader system compromise, data breach, or business disruption. Immediate escalation and response is critical.

subtasks.title: Initiate CIRT meeting
subtasks.content: Initiated emergency meeting of the core CIRT team.

subtasks.title: Notify CIRT members
subtasks.content: Notified all CIRT team members of credential compromise incident.

subtasks.title: Assess severity
subtasks.content: Assessed incident severity based on number of compromised credentials and privilege levels.

subtasks.title: Establish secure communications
subtasks.content: Established secure out-of-band communications in case primary channels are compromised.

subtasks.title: Work with Legal Counsel
subtasks.content: Engaged Legal Counsel for potential data breach and regulatory notification requirements.

tasks.title: Validate Credential Compromise
tasks.content: Confirm that credentials have been compromised and identify the source and method of compromise.

subtasks.title: Review security alerts
subtasks.content: Reviewed security alerts for impossible travel, unusual login times, failed login attempts, or credential stuffing patterns.

subtasks.title: Check dark web monitoring
subtasks.content: Checked dark web monitoring services and breach databases for leaked organizational credentials.

subtasks.title: Analyze authentication logs
subtasks.content: Analyzed authentication logs for suspicious login patterns, geographic anomalies, or credential validation attempts.

subtasks.title: Identify compromise source
subtasks.content: Identified source of compromise: phishing, malware, data breach, credential stuffing, brute force, or insider threat.

subtasks.title: Verify unauthorized access
subtasks.content: Verified whether compromised credentials were used for unauthorized access to systems or data.

tasks.title: Determine Scope of Compromise
tasks.content: Identify all compromised accounts, privilege levels, and systems that may have been accessed.

subtasks.title: Identify compromised accounts
subtasks.content: Identified all user accounts with compromised credentials through log analysis and breach data correlation.

subtasks.title: Assess privilege levels
subtasks.content: Assessed privilege levels of compromised accounts including administrator, privileged user, or standard user accounts.

subtasks.title: Review account activity
subtasks.content: Reviewed activity logs for compromised accounts to identify systems accessed, data viewed, or actions taken.

subtasks.title: Check for lateral movement
subtasks.content: Checked for signs of lateral movement or privilege escalation from compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Identify password reuse
subtasks.content: Identified users who may have reused compromised passwords across multiple systems or services.

tasks.title: Assess Impact
tasks.content: Assess the operational, data, and regulatory impact of the credential compromise.

subtasks.title: Assess data exposure
subtasks.content: Assessed what sensitive data may have been accessed through compromised credentials including PII, PHI, financial data, or intellectual property.

subtasks.title: Assess business disruption
subtasks.content: Assessed potential for business disruption from locked accounts, system access issues, or attacker actions.

subtasks.title: Assess regulatory impact
subtasks.content: Assessed whether credential compromise triggers data breach notification requirements under applicable regulations.

subtasks.title: Assess reputational damage
subtasks.content: Assessed potential reputational damage from credential compromise and potential data exposure.

tasks.title: Determine Root Cause
tasks.content: Identify how credentials were compromised to inform remediation and prevention.

subtasks.title: Check for phishing
subtasks.content: Checked for phishing campaigns targeting users and credential harvesting attempts.

subtasks.title: Check for malware
subtasks.content: Checked for info-stealer malware, keyloggers, or credential-harvesting trojans on endpoints.

subtasks.title: Review third-party breaches
subtasks.content: Reviewed recent third-party data breaches for leaked organizational credentials from password reuse.

subtasks.title: Check for brute force
subtasks.content: Checked for brute force or password spraying attacks against authentication systems.

subtasks.title: Identify weak passwords
subtasks.content: Identified use of weak, default, or commonly compromised passwords.

tasks.title: Send Communications
tasks.content: Alert affected users and stakeholders about credential compromise.

subtasks.title: Notify affected users
subtasks.content: Notified users with compromised credentials and provided password reset instructions.

subtasks.title: Send security alert
subtasks.content: Sent organization-wide security alert about credential compromise and password security best practices.

subtasks.title: Notify leadership
subtasks.content: Notified executive leadership about scope and severity of credential compromise.

phases.name: Containment
phases.description: The main objective of the Containment stage is to immediately revoke compromised credentials and prevent further unauthorized access.

tasks.title: Disable Compromised Accounts
tasks.content: Immediately disable or lock accounts with compromised credentials to prevent unauthorized access.

subtasks.title: Disable user accounts
subtasks.content: Disabled all user accounts with confirmed compromised credentials in Active Directory and authentication systems.

subtasks.title: Revoke active sessions
subtasks.content: Revoked all active sessions and tokens for compromised accounts across all systems.

subtasks.title: Disable privileged accounts
subtasks.content: Immediately disabled any compromised privileged or administrative accounts.

subtasks.title: Revoke API keys
subtasks.content: Revoked API keys, service account credentials, and application passwords associated with compromised accounts.

tasks.title: Force Password Resets
tasks.content: Force immediate password resets for compromised accounts and potentially affected users.

subtasks.title: Reset compromised passwords
subtasks.content: Forced immediate password reset for all accounts with compromised credentials.

subtasks.title: Reset passwords for password reuse
subtasks.content: Forced password reset for users who may have reused passwords across multiple systems.

subtasks.title: Expire old passwords
subtasks.content: Configured systems to reject old passwords and require new unique passwords.

subtasks.title: Implement temporary passwords
subtasks.content: Generated secure temporary passwords for immediate reset with forced change on first login.

tasks.title: Revoke Authentication Tokens and Sessions
tasks.content: Revoke all authentication tokens, refresh tokens, and persistent sessions that could be used for access.

subtasks.title: Revoke OAuth tokens
subtasks.content: Revoked all OAuth tokens and application authorizations for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Clear SSO sessions
subtasks.content: Cleared all single sign-on (SSO) sessions for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Invalidate cookies
subtasks.content: Invalidated persistent authentication cookies and remember-me tokens.

subtasks.title: Reset MFA devices
subtasks.content: Reset multi-factor authentication devices and registrations for compromised accounts.

tasks.title: Monitor for Credential Abuse
tasks.content: Implement enhanced monitoring to detect any continued attempts to use compromised credentials.

subtasks.title: Monitor authentication attempts
subtasks.content: Set up alerts for failed authentication attempts using old or compromised credentials.

subtasks.title: Monitor for credential stuffing
subtasks.content: Monitored for credential stuffing attacks attempting to use stolen credentials.

subtasks.title: Track geographic anomalies
subtasks.content: Tracked login attempts from unusual geographic locations or IP addresses.

tasks.title: Block Attacker Infrastructure
tasks.content: Block IP addresses and infrastructure associated with credential compromise attempts.

subtasks.title: Block malicious IPs
subtasks.content: Blocked IP addresses associated with unauthorized login attempts and credential abuse.

subtasks.title: Block suspicious geographies
subtasks.content: Blocked authentication from high-risk geographic regions if not required for business.

subtasks.title: Implement rate limiting
subtasks.content: Implemented rate limiting on authentication endpoints to prevent credential stuffing.

phases.name: Eradication
phases.description: The Eradication stage focuses on removing the root cause of compromise and strengthening credential security.

tasks.title: Remove Malware and Info-Stealers
tasks.content: If credentials were compromised via malware, ensure all malicious software is removed from affected systems.

subtasks.title: Scan for malware
subtasks.content: Performed comprehensive malware scans on all systems used by compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Remove info-stealers
subtasks.content: Removed credential-stealing malware, keyloggers, and browser password dumpers.

subtasks.title: Rebuild infected systems
subtasks.content: Rebuilt systems with severe infections from clean images.

subtasks.title: Verify clean state
subtasks.content: Verified systems are clean through multiple scanning methods before restoring access.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication
tasks.content: Deploy or enforce multi-factor authentication across all systems to prevent credential-only compromise.

subtasks.title: Deploy MFA solution
subtasks.content: Deployed or enhanced multi-factor authentication solution across all critical systems.

subtasks.title: Enforce MFA policies
subtasks.content: Enforced mandatory MFA for all users, especially privileged accounts and remote access.

subtasks.title: Disable legacy authentication
subtasks.content: Disabled legacy authentication protocols that don't support MFA (e.g., basic auth, legacy email protocols).

subtasks.title: Implement phishing-resistant MFA
subtasks.content: Prioritized phishing-resistant MFA methods like hardware tokens, FIDO2, or biometrics over SMS.

tasks.title: Strengthen Password Policies
tasks.content: Implement stronger password policies and requirements to prevent weak credential compromise.

subtasks.title: Enforce password complexity
subtasks.content: Enforced strong password complexity requirements including minimum length, character diversity.

subtasks.title: Block compromised passwords
subtasks.content: Implemented password breach database checking to prevent use of known compromised passwords.

subtasks.title: Prevent password reuse
subtasks.content: Configured password history to prevent reuse of recent passwords.

subtasks.title: Implement password manager
subtasks.content: Deployed enterprise password manager to encourage unique strong passwords for each system.

tasks.title: Implement Credential Monitoring
tasks.content: Deploy credential monitoring to detect future compromises early.

subtasks.title: Deploy dark web monitoring
subtasks.content: Deployed dark web monitoring service to detect leaked organizational credentials.

subtasks.title: Monitor breach databases
subtasks.content: Configured monitoring of public breach databases and credential dumps.

subtasks.title: Set up alerts
subtasks.content: Set up real-time alerts when organizational credentials appear in breaches or on dark web.

subtasks.title: Implement SIEM correlation
subtasks.content: Configured SIEM to correlate authentication anomalies with credential compromise intelligence.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.description: The Recovery stage aims to restore user access securely and verify no unauthorized access persists.

tasks.title: Securely Restore User Access
tasks.content: Restore access for legitimate users after verifying identity and securing accounts.

subtasks.title: Verify user identities
subtasks.content: Verified identities of users requesting account restoration through established procedures.

subtasks.title: Re-enable accounts
subtasks.content: Re-enabled user accounts after password reset and MFA enrollment.

subtasks.title: Verify MFA enrollment
subtasks.content: Verified that all restored accounts have properly registered MFA methods.

subtasks.title: Test account access
subtasks.content: Tested that users can successfully authenticate and access required resources.

tasks.title: Audit Account Permissions
tasks.content: Review and right-size account permissions following principle of least privilege.

subtasks.title: Review account permissions
subtasks.content: Reviewed permissions for all affected accounts and removed unnecessary access rights.

subtasks.title: Implement least privilege
subtasks.content: Implemented principle of least privilege for all restored accounts.

subtasks.title: Separate privileged accounts
subtasks.content: Ensured privileged users have separate admin accounts from daily-use accounts.

subtasks.title: Document permission changes
subtasks.content: Documented all permission changes made during recovery for audit trail.

tasks.title: Validate No Unauthorized Access Persists
tasks.content: Verify that no unauthorized access or attacker persistence remains in the environment.

subtasks.title: Review authentication logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed authentication logs for any remaining suspicious activity.

subtasks.title: Check for backdoor accounts
subtasks.content: Checked for creation of backdoor accounts or unauthorized service accounts.

subtasks.title: Verify no data exfiltration
subtasks.content: Verified that no ongoing data exfiltration is occurring from compromised credentials.

subtasks.title: Scan for persistence
subtasks.content: Scanned for persistence mechanisms like scheduled tasks, scripts, or modified configurations.

tasks.title: Issue Final Communications
tasks.content: Communicate incident resolution and new security requirements to users.

subtasks.title: Notify users of resolution
subtasks.content: Notified users that incident is resolved and normal access is restored.

subtasks.title: Communicate security changes
subtasks.content: Communicated new security requirements including MFA, password policies, and monitoring.

subtasks.title: Provide support resources
subtasks.content: Provided IT support resources for users having difficulty with new security requirements.

tasks.title: Resolve Incident
tasks.content: Formally close the credential compromise incident.

subtasks.title: Verify all actions complete
subtasks.content: Verified all remediation actions are complete and environment is secure.

subtasks.title: Change incident status
subtasks.content: Changed incident status to 'resolved'.

phases.name: Lessons Learned
phases.description: The Lessons Learned stage compiles incident information and implements improvements to prevent future credential compromise.

tasks.title: Generate Incident Report
tasks.content: Create comprehensive incident report documenting credential compromise and response.

subtasks.title: Generate report
subtasks.content: Generated incident report using the Reports tab.

subtasks.title: Document compromise source
subtasks.content: Documented how credentials were compromised and attack vectors used.

subtasks.title: Document affected accounts
subtasks.content: Documented number and types of affected accounts, data accessed, and business impact.

subtasks.title: Share with stakeholders
subtasks.content: Shared report with appropriate stakeholders including security, IT, and leadership.

tasks.title: Conduct Lessons Learned Session
tasks.content: Hold session to identify improvements to credential security and incident response.

subtasks.title: Prepare presentation
subtasks.content: Prepared presentation covering incident timeline, root cause, and response effectiveness.

subtasks.title: Host session
subtasks.content: Hosted lessons learned session with Security, IT, and stakeholder teams.

subtasks.title: Identify gaps
subtasks.content: Identified gaps in password policies, MFA coverage, monitoring, and user awareness.

subtasks.title: Create improvement plan
subtasks.content: Created prioritized action plan for implementing security improvements.

tasks.title: Implement Security Awareness Training
tasks.content: Deploy credential security training for all users.

subtasks.title: Deploy password training
subtasks.content: Deployed training on password security, unique passwords, and password manager usage.

subtasks.title: Conduct phishing awareness
subtasks.content: Conducted phishing awareness training to prevent credential harvesting.

subtasks.title: Provide MFA training
subtasks.content: Provided training on MFA setup, usage, and security best practices.

subtasks.title: Conduct simulated attacks
subtasks.content: Planned simulated phishing and credential compromise exercises to test awareness.

tasks.title: Enhance Credential Security Program
tasks.content: Continuously improve credential security based on emerging threats and best practices.

subtasks.title: Expand MFA coverage
subtasks.content: Expanded MFA coverage to all systems and applications.

subtasks.title: Implement passwordless authentication
subtasks.content: Evaluated and implemented passwordless authentication where feasible.

subtasks.title: Enhance monitoring
subtasks.content: Enhanced authentication monitoring and anomaly detection capabilities.

subtasks.title: Update policies
subtasks.content: Updated password and authentication policies based on lessons learned.
